channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Corner by railway, 2nd April
item.description:
Someone has dumped clothes and a game terminal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.category: Vehicles for sale on the public road

item.title: This was dump here from the flats in Albery Apartments. I saw them doing it on Thursday morning., 2nd April
item.description:
This piece of furniture is blocking the carriageway and is a hazard to pedestrians as it could fall over and hurt passers by.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trinity Place, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Barnham drive near the roundabout on Central and also outside 1 newmarsh Road, 2nd April
item.description:
Ongoing fly tipping issues . New deposits and also outside 1 Newmarsh Road which is either rented or owned by the council and between occupations this rubbish has been left by the orders assigned to refurbish between days occupations leaving rubbish behind which is falling into the public council owned pavements . Unacceptable

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newmarsh Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on the bend, 2nd April
item.description:
Just on the bend big pothole and is growing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large yellow barriers, left after pavement repair, 2nd April
item.description:
Two large barriers left after work completed. When windy they blow down across the pavement, blocking it completely. We have a school in our street, so mothers with buggies and small children have problems. Anyone who’s blind or travelling on mobility scooter would have serious problems. They have been there about one month. Obviously not needed. We have a windy weekend coming so this will happen again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris on the green verge, 2nd April
item.description:
Debris on the green verge all area of the green verge included under the shrubs, please attend and clean

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23,24, Craylands, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant, deep pot hole, 2nd April
item.description:
Deep dangerous pot hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merlin Grove, Eden Park, Greater London

item.title: Sunken brick leaving deep hole, 2nd April
item.description:
Recurring problem in this area of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemerton Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Uneven footpath all along the even side street footpath., 2nd April
item.description:
Uneven loose broken paving slabs along the footpath. Very dangerous and unable to safely push wheelchair and pushchairs along.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving slab, 2nd April
item.description:
A paving slab stone on top east side of Fountain Green Square is badly raised up, compared to the other slabs and is a dangerous trip hazard. Indeed one of our party did trip over on the raised slab, injuring her face.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall West, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken uneven paving slab on footpath between no 4-6, 2nd April
item.description:
Uneven loose broken paving slabs along the footpath. Has been like this for over a year.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in hedge, 2nd April
item.description:
Also more dumped further up the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telegraph Path, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Leaking water, 2nd April
item.description:
From water main.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159-175, Beckenham Road, Elmers End, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping - household, 2nd April
item.description:
Fly tipping - bed frame, bedroom furniture and general.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arch 8, Chancel Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal Detector Request, 2nd April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 02/04/26 15:11 Hello, I am inquiring about who owns the Riverpool Walkway open space because I am interested in metal detecting, after doing some thorough research I realised that I needed permission from the landowner, the advice on the internet was to email the council of the borough that the area was in. If it is owned by the council I would like to negotiate permission to metal detect here. If it isn't owned by the Bromley council please let me know. I would appreciate advice as well. I am not doing it commercially, I am 12yrs old and a resident of Bromley, I am only doing it as a hobby.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Bristow Road Pickford Road end on grass area o/s 69 - 71, 2nd April
item.description:
On Sunday evening someone flytipped a dirty sofa chair by the bin in Bristow Road (pickford end) as this was blocking the pavement and was clearly dangerous to pedestrians we pushed the sofa on to the grass area to prevent any accident. I reported this fytipping to bexley council yesterday requesting fytipping be removed as a matter of urgency but it has not yet been removed. Can you please arrange for this to be done as soon as possible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bristow Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent litter picking request, 2nd April
item.description:
Please send a litter picker! It’s been like this for ages! Why we never see any cleaners here!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MEtal, 2nd April
item.description:
Metal flytipped. Was on green but moved onto pavement outside 132.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking please, 2nd April
item.description:
This part of Peckham Park Road is always very messy, full of random litter! It’s a busy area Please send a litter picker!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
